misconceptions.display_name: Simpson's Rule works with odd n
misconceptions.description: Believes Simpson's Rule can use any n; in fact n must be even so nodes pair into parabolic arcs.
trigger_phrases: odd number of subintervals is fine for simpson

misconceptions.display_name: Dropping the Delta x/2 or Delta x/3 factor
misconceptions.description: Multiplies the weighted node sum by Delta x instead of Delta x/2 (trapezoid) or Delta x/3 (Simpson).
trigger_phrases: just multiply the sum by delta x

misconceptions.description: Gives every node weight 1, ignoring the 1-2-2-...-1 (trapezoid) or 1-4-2-4-...-1 (Simpson) weighting.
trigger_phrases: add up all the f values equally
